args.command: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/compare -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"command":"rm -rf /tmp/build && git push --force origin main"}' | python3 -m json.tool 2>&1 | head -30

args.command: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/compare -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"command":"rm -rf /tmp/build && git push --force origin main"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);triggered=[k for k,v in d['scorers'].items() if v['triggered']];print(f'Final: {d[\"final\"][\"source\"]} → {d[\"final\"][\"decision\"]} (risk={d[\"final\"][\"risk\"]:.3f})');print(f'Triggered: {triggered}')"
